name: GOLFTEC Houston Heights
about: GOLFTEC Houston Heights is a high-tech golf training studio that utilizes data-driven instruction to improve golf skills. The center offers personalized golf lessons, club fittings, and practice sessions using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback. This studio is best suited for golfers looking to systematically improve their game through expert coaching and objective performance metrics.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and OPTIMOTION technology for precise swing analysis
Access to personalized coaching with PGA professionals to create customized improvement plans
Simulated on-course lessons to help apply skills in real-world playing conditions

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services available.
No information on alcohol services available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Specific simulator hardware models not mentioned in content.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are encouraged to bring your own clubs for lessons and fittings, but club rentals are also available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information on outside food or drink policies is available; it is recommended to confirm directly with the venue.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulation can vary depending on the software and pace of play, but it typically takes 1.5 to 2.5 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is suitable for youth golfers, but specific amenities for children are not detailed.
